case_title: GRICELDA ROMERO ET AL VS. PAUL WONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62688695) FILED BY DEFENDANT WONG, PAUL WONG, CAROL Y. DIRICCO, ROBERT J. CARRION-DIRICCO, ROSARIO JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 15.0 DAYS

DISCOVERY 302, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT PAUL WONG'S UNOPPOSED MOTION TO COMPEL INITIAL RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS' FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE), SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE) AND DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS (SET ONE), AND FOR MONETARY DISCOVERY SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $90, IS GRANTED. WITHIN 14 DAYS OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER PLAINTIFFS SHALL PROVIDE CODE-COMPLIANT RESPONSES, WITHOUT OBJECTIONS (INCLUDING OBJECTIONS BASED ON PRIVILEGE OR ON THE PROTECTION FOR WORK PRODUCT, SUBJECT TO THE PROVISIONS OF CCP 2030.290(A) AND 2031.300(A) PROVIDING FOR RELIEF FROM WAIVER OF SUCH OBJECTIONS), AND PAY DEFENDANTS' COUNSEL DISCOVERY SANCTIONS IN THE REQUESTED AMOUNT. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROGER MEAD; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-24-2020 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-04-2019 Continued To Mar-09-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Initial Responses To Written Discovery
Off Calendar Mar-14-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joseph W. Tursi, Esq., Phillips Spallas, & Angstadt LLP, Telephone 415-278-9400, appearing for DefendantPaul Wong;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT PAUL WONG'S Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Initial Responses To Written Discovery.

Defendants' unopposed motion to compel initial responses to Defendants' Form Interrogatories (Set One), Special Interrogatories (Set One) and Demand For Production of Documents (Set One), and for monetary discovery sanctions in the amount of $90, is granted. Within 14 days of service of notice of entry of this order Plaintiffs shall provide code-compliant responses, without objections (including objections based on privilege or on the protection for work product, subject to the provisions of CCP 2030.290(a) and 2031.300(a) providing for relief from waiver of such objections), and pay Defendants' counsel discovery sanctions in the requested amount.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2018 Set For Trial On Aug-19-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
